---
title: "Sentences"
---

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Tues 10/6 | Sentences | SGN Ch. 9: *Building dependencies* | | 
| Thurs 10/8 | Sentences | | 
| Tues 10/13 | Sentences | Ding et al. (2016)
| Tues 10/20 |  Sentence structure in aphasia | Dronkers & Baldo (2009) | [UBC aphasia videos](https://neuroanatomy.ca/modules/Language/story.html) |
| Thurs 10/15 | Sign language linguistics | Newport & Supalla (1999) | |
| Thurs 10/22 | Sign language aphasia |  Hickok, Bellugi, & Klima (1998) | |
| Tues 10/27 | <span class="exam-badge">Exam #3</span>


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Sentences
(To be added)

:::
